sellers_note: ALL-ELECTRIC, LOW MILEAGE, NO-ACCIDENT, ONE-OWNER, OFF-LEASE, NONSMOKER, THE FUTURE IS HERE! The 2023 Tesla Model 3 RWD continues to redefine what drivers expect from a modern sedan. With instant electric performance, remarkable efficiency, cutting-edge technology, and an exceptionally low cost of ownership, the Model 3 remains one of the world's most influential electric vehicles. Whether commuting across town or heading out on a weekend road trip, it delivers a driving experience that's smooth, quiet, and undeniably futuristic. Powered entirely by electricity, the Model 3 RWD produces immediate torque the moment you touch the accelerator, delivering responsive performance without consuming a drop of gasoline. Combined with Tesla's sophisticated software, aerodynamic design, and industry-leading charging network, every journey becomes remarkably efficient and enjoyable. WHY SHOPPERS BUY THE MODEL 3 The Model 3 has become one of the world's best-selling electric vehicles because it combines outstanding efficiency, advanced technology, exceptional safety, and everyday practicality into one sleek package. Buyers appreciate its intuitive touchscreen interface, spacious cabin, over-the-air software updates, and access to Tesla's extensive Supercharger network. Unlike traditional vehicles that remain largely unchanged after purchase, the Model 3 continues to evolve through software updates that can improve features, performance, and convenience over time. It's a sedan that grows with its owner while maintaining impressively low operating costs. AUTOMOTIVE PRESS AND INDUSTRY RECOGNITION The Model 3 has received widespread acclaim for its efficiency, performance, technology, and outstanding safety. Automotive journalists consistently rank it among the very best electric vehicles available thanks to its impressive driving range, engaging dynamics, and seamless charging experience. IIHS TOP SAFETY PICK+ NHTSA 5-Star Overall Safety Rating Kelley Blue Book Best Buy Award for Electric Vehicles Frequently recommended by Edmunds and U.S. News & World Report among electric sedans WARRANTY The odometer is hovering around the 14,975-mile mark, and it is STILL COVERED by the factory. New Vehicle Limited Warranty -- comprehensive coverage through June 17, 2027 or 50,000 miles, whichever comes first. High-Voltage Battery Limited Warranty -- coverage through June 17, 2031 or 100,000 miles, whichever comes first. Drive Unit Limited Warranty -- coverage through June 17, 2031 or 100,000 miles, whichever comes first. Extended protection plans may also be available to provide additional peace of mind beyond the remaining factory coverage. STANDARD FEATURES The Model 3 RWD offers an exceptionally modern ownership experience with heated seating, premium connectivity capability, a panoramic glass roof, wireless phone charging, premium audio, advanced navigation, over-the-air software updates, and Tesla's minimalist interior design centered around its signature 15-inch touchscreen. Its flat-floor electric platform creates impressive passenger room while both the rear cargo area and front trunk provide outstanding storage flexibility for everyday errands or longer road trips. INSTALLED OPTIONS Standalone Factory Options Pearl White Multi-Coat premium exterior paint. White and Black Partial Premium Interior. Additional factory equipment may be present but could not be independently verified. Accordingly, only confirmed factory-installed equipment has been listed. CHARGING, RANGE & ELECTRIFIED POWERTRAIN The Model 3 RWD is powered by a 60 kWh lithium-ion battery paired with a rear-mounted electric motor producing approximately 271 horsepower. EPA-estimated driving range when new was 272 miles, providing more than enough capability for daily commuting while remaining exceptionally efficient on longer journeys. Level 1 (120V Household Outlet): Approximately 3-4 miles of range per hour of charging. Level 2 (240V AC Charging): Up to approximately 11.5 kW, allowin Wholesale Prices: We started off as a wholesaler that provided vehicles to licensed dealerships only. Eventually, we realized that we wanted to provide our high-quality selection of vehicles to the public.
